description: Phase 30 scan_registry_cso_parity: every entry in continuous_scan_order must be declared in scanner_registry (time_invariant OR time_dependent OR meta). Registry entries missing from CSO are allowed only if in the on-demand allowlist {health, idempotence, selftest}. Catches two drift modes: a new scanner added to the continuous run without registry declaration (silent execution of undeclared code), and a registry entry that exists only on paper (declared but never executed). Gate: unregistered_count == 0.
actual_cmd: bash -c '[ -f reports/n6_registry_cso_parity.json ] && jq -r "if .unregistered_count == 0 then 1 else 0 end" reports/n6_registry_cso_parity.json 2>/dev/null || echo 0'
